Drug Response Plotting Update (14.8.23)

Aditi and Ashwini

Plots Generated

Boxplots for 96w and Slide samples (S071_pOme, S085_pOme, S102_pOme, S119_pOme, S114_pOme, S038_rAdn, S041_rOva, S045_rOva (treatment resistant))
HDR vs HRP boxplot for PDS samples
Boxplots and heatmaps for 384w samples (S141_pOval, S147_pOvaR, S156_AdnR, S203_pOme, S245_pAdn, S250_pOme, S255_pOme, S270_pAdn, S290_pOme)
Combined dot heatmaps for 384w samples
Per ratio and per treatment 
Combined killing efficiency heatmaps for 384w samples
ED25, ED50, ED75

Re analysis of the samples treated in 96 wells or Shandon slides

To set the threshold for markers, CellProfiler analysis was re done for most of the samples:
Integrated intensity for CK7, and mean intensity for CD45 /gH2AX were displayed from nuclear / cell segmentation
Intensity from the cells (CK7, and CD45), and nuclei (Gh2ax) were plotted
Marker intensities varied across the samples, so threshold for each sample was different

Integrated intensity CK7 from Cell segmentation

Samples are stained with CK7 (tumor cell), CD45 (immune cells), gH2AX (DNA damage)
 and dead cell marker /cleaved caspase 3

The dead cell marker was not consistent across the samples, hence decided to analyze abundance of CK7 / CD45+ cells

Mean intensity CD45 from Cell segmentation

HRD-tumor derived iPDCs show better response to Olaparib and Pembrolizumab compared to HRP

T cells proliferate in response to Pembrolizumab in HRD cultures compared to HRP

HRD tumor-derived iPDCs show significantly higher response to Olaparib and Pembrolizumab compared to HRP

Challenges (1/3)

Boxplots for 96w and Slide samples (S071_pOme, S085_pOme, S102_pOme, S119_pOme, S114_pOme, S038_rAdn, S041_rOva, S045_rOva (treatment resistant))
PDS samples lacked reliable DCM (excluded ‘alive’ ratios)

Treatment resistant sample plots did not match Elina’s plots (Tried to replicate Elina’s code, spoke to Matilda and Jie about Elina’s filtering approach, and decided to stick with our script and Ashwini reanalyzed S038_rAdn and S045_rOva)

HRD vs HRP boxplots: S119 is seemingly sensitivity to Ola and Pembro despite HRP status (S119_pOme: Of the 10 images, in 9 images Cell Profiler recognized fewer than 2 CK7 cells despite observable tumor spheres. Perhaps this discrepancy is due to a staining error, for example, the Ab was not evenly distributed or images were over exposed)
Should we exclude S119?

Drug-treated samples analyzed from 384 wells

S141_pOva

S147_pOva

Immune cell abundance in drug treated d0 samples

Expression of functional markers across immune cell types in d0 samples

Mean intensity (scaled)

Challenges (2/3)

Boxplots, heatmaps, and combined heatmaps for 384w samples (S141_pOval, S147_pOvaR, S156_AdnR, S203_pOme, S245_pAdn, S250_pOme, S255_pOme, S270_pAdn, S290_pOme)
Results from the plots did not accurately represent abundance of cells in images (Ashwini re-set thresholds for each sample and created a spreadsheet with thresholds per patient → automatically loaded into script)

Handling Na values and Inf (I went through each sample to determine the reason for NaNa or Inf values. Calculating ratio produced NA values if there are 0 cells, of a certain criteria, in the treatment group wells. Inf values are produced if the DMSO group wells contain 0 cells. For this reason, in the heatmaps I set Na values to the lowest fold change value and Inf to the highest fold change value so that this data can still be plotted)

Which ratios are the most meaningful? (Review dot heatmaps together)

Challenges (3/3)

Combined killing efficiency heatmaps for 384w samples
Tried clustering the samples (but the samples did not cluster by HDR status, perhaps we need more samples for the clustering to be informative)

Looks like many cells died in the DMSO wells in sample S141, S147, and both S156 samples (Unfortunately these samples are mostly HRD. Perhaps we can divide or subtract by the DMSO proportion?)

Next steps

Include 2-3 more samples for 384 plate combination test?

Select 1 & 7 uM ATRi in combination with 0.2 & 0.7 uM ATXi for functional activation of T cells (Abhilash). More combinations to be tested for activation of T cells?

For the drug combination-treated samples, select d0 samples for scRNA seq (Aditi)?

t-CyCIF on the FFPE of the drug-treated samples to look for myeloid and T cell interactions and functional states?
